[vc_row content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1592795754440{padding-top: 35px !important;padding-bottom: 70px !important;background-image: url(https://thuongthien.vn/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/about-us-head-bg.jpg?id=386) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}” el_class=”about-us-row”][vc_column width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1592555086915{margin-top: 15px !important;padding-top: 35px !important;padding-left: 35px !important;background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.95) !important;*background-color: rgb(255,255,255) !important;}”][vc_column_text]

THUONG THIEN TECHNOLOGIES CO. LTD (TTT)

TTT has been in collaboration with Solar Turbines since last 20 year to provide Vietnam customers with the highest quality Gas Turbines, Generators, Compressors and Service Solutions within Oil & Gas and Electricity Power Generation industry.[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]TTT is a member of

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″ offset=”vc_hidden-sm vc_hidden-xs”][vc_column_text][/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_section full_width=”stretch_row” el_class=”ttt-gradient-section”][vc_row equal_height=”yes” content_placement=”middle” el_class=”box-shadow reverse-row”][vc_column width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1592392247417{background-color: #374fa1 !important;}”][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1592392255126{padding-top: 25px !important;padding-right: 25px !important;padding-bottom: 25px !important;padding-left: 25px !important;background-color: #374fa1 !important;}”][vc_accordion active_tab=”3″ title_size=”h3″ style=”3″ el_class=”ttt-accor”][vc_accordion_tab title=”OUR VISION”][vc_column_text]

Become the most Valued Business Partner to the Clients and Principals in Vietnam O&G, Energy and Power Market.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_accordion_tab][vc_accordion_tab title=”OUR MISSION”][vc_column_text]Provide the highest standardized products with the best quality services to our clients.[/vc_column_text][/vc_accordion_tab][vc_accordion_tab title=”CORE VALUES”][vc_column_text]

INTEGRITY

Probity, righteous and law abiding attitudes – The company’s greatest value.

CUSTOMER CARE

We care about you and your business.

TRANSPARENCY

Conducting honesty, straightforwardness and openness in all matters – the company’s most valuable asset.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_accordion_tab][/vc_accordion][/vc_column][/vc_row][/vc_section][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” css=”.vc_custom_1592386444491{padding-top: 80px !important;padding-bottom: 100px !important;background-color: #f2f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Our History

THE STORY OF SUCCESS

[/vc_column_text][vc_raw_html][/vc_raw_html][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_section full_width=”stretch_row” css=”.vc_custom_1592383644044{padding-top: 80px !important;padding-bottom: 120px !important;background: #f2f2f2 url(https://thuongthien.vn/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/world-map-cover-bg-2.jpg?id=102) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}”][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Locations

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row”][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_raw_html][/vc_raw_html][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_raw_html][/vc_raw_html][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/3″][vc_raw_html][/vc_raw_html][/vc_column][/vc_row][/vc_section]
